diffs.explanation: Migrated Spring REST controller to NestJS decorator-based controller format. Key changes: Replaced @Autowired with constructor injection, modernized decorators, and added async/await pattern.
diffs.impact: Higher testability, better dependency injection pattern, native TypeScript support

diffs.explanation: Replaced JDBC direct queries with TypeORM repository pattern. Async/await ensures non-blocking I/O, and DTOs provide validation.
diffs.impact: Type-safe database operations, better query optimization, async I/O for better performance
